settings.heading: Garland, Texas apparel production for schools, companies and teams.
settings.lead: L F Graphco LLC is a Garland, Texas shop with real production equipment, staged orders and finished customer apparel shown in the uploaded photos.
settings.body:
The uploaded shop photos show embroidery machines, screen printing work in progress, apparel blanks and boxes staged for production, and finished shirts for community events, Greek life, custom automotive art and organization campaigns.

That practical mix supports what local buyers need most: clear quote guidance, visible production proof, finished product examples and dependable apparel programs for schools, businesses, teams and community groups.
settings.features: Garland TX,Embroidery Equipment,Screen Printing Workflow,Finished Customer Shirts,Shop Workspace

settings.heading: A local production shop with visible customer work.
settings.intro: Photos show the workspace, service signage, staged orders and finished apparel produced for real groups.
